programme.title: Beyond the ROX
programme.sub-title: Grind to glory: off-season prep to be an Elite 15
programme.desc: HYROX athletes grind in the off-season to balance their personal lives with the ambition, endurance, recovery, and mental and physical strength required to compete with the Elite 15.
programme.series-desc: Discover the physical and mental grind required in the off-season to compete against HYROX’s elite athletes.

programme.title: Beyond the ROX
programme.sub-title: Relentless rise: fresh faces and the next level
programme.desc: Sadiq Elfitouri shares the transition from football to HYROX, and OCR World Champion Ida Mathilde makes a spectacular debut, as the fast-growing sport draws athletes from all fields.
programme.series-desc: Every record is on the line as HYROX’s rapid growth sees fresh faces and the seasoned Elite 15 compete.

programme.title: Beyond the ROX
programme.sub-title: Game-changers: Jake Dearden and the women’s rise
programme.desc: The pressure has peaked for Jake Dearden as he qualifies for the World Final, new competitors challenge the veterans, and the growth of the women’s field proves expert coaching can change the game.
programme.series-desc: New faces challenge the veterans, and expert coaches fuel the growth of the women’s field.

programme.title: Beyond the ROX
programme.sub-title: Unfiltered moments: high stakes and high emotions
programme.desc: The mix of joy and anxiety fuelling athletes is mirrored by their loved ones, rivalries intensify and a wildcard competitor shakes things up, while Lucy Procter takes her spot in the Elite 15.
programme.series-desc: The unguarded reactions of families during competition show the high stakes aren’t just for the athletes.

programme.title: Beyond the ROX
programme.sub-title: Ambitions realised: the rookie vs the legends
programme.desc: After years of hard work and dedicated training, Jake Dearden finally reaches the Elite 15 race. How will the rookie stack up against the world's best in the 2024/25 season?
programme.series-desc: Jake Dearden reaches the Elite 15 race after years of hard work and dedication. How will the rookie stack up?

programme.title: Resilience
programme.desc: Follow Els Visser's journey from surviving a ship wreck to becoming a triathlon and Ironman athlete. description : How does surviving a ship wreck lead to someone becoming a successful triathlete? Learn about Els Visser's journey from medical student to sporting success via a life-threatening disaster at sea.
programme.series-desc: Follow Els Visser's journey from surviving a ship wreck to becoming a triathlon and Ironman athlete.

programme.title: Paved
programme.sub-title: An unfiltered snow odyssey two years in the making
programme.desc: Part history lesson, part hangout, part backcountry odyssey, Paved – a Burton and Red Bull Media House co-production – celebrates the passion and soul of snowboarding in raw, wry and light-hearted style.
programme.series-desc: Experience the joy as snowboarding’s elite push boundaries and chase podium dreams ahead of the 2026 season.

programme.title: Pressure Drop
programme.sub-title: Born from a dream, this is TGR’s 30th annual film
programme.desc: Follow the world’s best skiers and snowboarders in a cinematic ride through risk, beauty and the pursuit of perfection.
programme.series-desc: Follow elite skiers and snowboarders in a cinematic ride through risk, beauty and the pursuit of perfection.

programme.title: After the Snowfall
programme.sub-title: A celebration of skiing in its purest form
programme.desc: Filmed in breath-taking locations around the world, Matchstick Productions bring us a celebration of skiing. Elite athletes and everyday skiers risk all to seek joy-filled moments in the mountains.
programme.series-desc: Elite skiers celebrate skiing’s soul, from deep powder to joy-filled moments around the world.

programme.title: She Who Flies
programme.sub-title: Mathilde Gremaud: the dramatic rise of a champion freeskier
programme.desc: From record-breaking highs to moments of doubt, injuries and personal struggles, She Who Flies follows Mathilde Gremaud’s rise as one of the world’s most innovative and decorated freeskiers.
programme.series-desc: This cinematic journey charts the highs, lows and in-betweens of Freeski World Champion Mathilde Gremaud.

programme.title: Unrideable
programme.desc: Red Bull Erzbergrodeo pushes riders to the limit. Last year's winner, Manuel Lettenbichler, faces rising star Mitch Brightmore for 2024.
programme.series-desc: At Red Bull Erzbergrodeo, 2023's winner – Manuel Lettenbichler – faces rising star Mitch Brightmore.

programme.title: Unrideable
programme.desc: Wade Young aims to prove his worth as a privateer in the 2024 Xross Hard Enduro Rally and Red Bull Romaniacs after being dropped by his old team for Teodor Kabakchiev.
programme.series-desc: Wade Young gives his all as a privateer in the 2024 Xross Hard Enduro Rally and Red Bull Romaniacs.

programme.title: Unrideable
programme.desc: Manuel Lettenbichler’s 2024 season suffers a setback as the Brightmore brothers, Mitch and Ashton, face rising star Matt Green in a fierce battle.
programme.series-desc: Manuel Lettenbichler’s 2024 season suffers a setback as he battles the Brightmore brothers and Matt Green.

programme.title: Unrideable
programme.desc: Billy Bolt returns, as Mario Román chases his title dream. The rivals battle in Türkiye, racing literally from sea to sky.
programme.series-desc: Hard Enduro rivals Billy Bolt and Mario Román battle it out in Türkiye at the scenic 2024 Sea to Sky event.

programme.title: Unrideable
programme.desc: Big drama kicks off at 24MX Hixpania Hard Enduro – the 2024 season finale. Can Manuel Lettenbichler win the World Championship again or will someone else rise to glory?
programme.series-desc: Watch the drama as the FIM Hard Enduro World Championship 2024 finale plays out at 24MX Hixpania Hard Enduro.

programme.title: Against Gravity
programme.sub-title: Pro surfer Leon Glatzer’s journey of resilience
programme.desc: Born in the water, shaped by the ocean: surf pro Leon Glatzer shares how the sea shaped his life. Full of ups and downs, his story is all about the search for freedom.
programme.series-desc: The ocean is everything to surf pro Leon Glatzer. Watch and listen as he tells his moving story.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A Danish scientist's quest to find DNA evidence of the earliest people in the United States reveals shocking ethical and personal dilemmas.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.sub-title: Music in the Digital Age: Streaming & Reviews
programme.desc: Today on The Stream: We ask about the future of the music industry and art reviews.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Al Jazeera World
programme.desc: The secret transportation of thousands of Ethiopian Jews to Israel in the 1980s by the Mossad and the CIA - and their struggle to integrate into society today.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: An 11-year-old cemetery worker in Bolivia dreams of a better education as he struggles to support his family.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.sub-title: Music in the Digital Age: Streaming & Reviews
programme.desc: Today on The Stream: We ask about the future of the music industry and art reviews.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.sub-title: Music in the Digital Age: Streaming & Reviews
programme.desc: Today on The Stream: We ask about the future of the music industry and art reviews.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: An 11-year-old cemetery worker in Bolivia dreams of a better education as he struggles to support his family.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.desc: With rare access to El Salvador's high-security prisons, we explore the dark side of President Bukele's gang violence crackdown.
programme.series-desc:
People & Power is a current affairs programme on Al Jazeera English which broadcasts once a week, on Wednesdays, and repeated throughout the week.
Each half-hour programme features one investigative documentaries on an issue related to power from around the world. The programme occasionally has one hour specials.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.sub-title: Blue Zones - The Secret To a Long, Healthy Life?
programme.desc: Today on The Stream, five 'Blue Zones' host some of the healthiest, longest-living people. What's behind their longevity?
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.
